reviews.review_description: Object and space detection is impressively accurate. I’d just love more interaction modes for sighted helpers and support for more languages.
I can't start the application. It gets stuck on the initial screen where it says "Agree" and won't go any further.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pix_Virtua, thank you so much for letting me know about this issue — and I’m really sorry for the trouble it caused.

I wanted to let you know that the latest update has now fixed the startup problem where the app got stuck on the “Agree” screen. We’ve also added a brand-new microgesture control system and text recognition, which should make EchoEyes much easier and more powerful to use.

Please try downloading the updated version and launching the app again.
If anything still doesn’t work as expected, or if you have any suggestions, feel free to tell me anytime — I’m always here and happy to help.

Thanks again for your feedback! 🙏

reviews.review_description: I’m really surprised to see this kind of helpful app on Quest. I hope the developers can offer a free version, as it could help more blind people.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion. We are planning and thinking about new business models. We hope to launch a free version in the future to help more visually impaired users.

reviews.review_description:
I've had some amazing experiences using it. Let me tell you about two recent ones that really show how awesome it is.
So, I was staying at this hotel, right? Come breakfast time, I needed help figuring out where everything was - you know, the food, plates, napkins, the works. I fired up the app and got connected to this Echo Eyes who was just fantastic. They walked me through everything - showed me where to find the coffee machine and cups, taught me how to use it, and then gave me a rundown of all the other stuff around. I'm talking cereal, milk, eggs, sausage, muffins, bread, napkins, plates, cutlery - the whole shebang. Thanks to them, I knew my way around that breakfast buffet for my entire week-long stay. Talk about a game-changer!
Later during my stay, I called another Echo Eyes to help me figure out the treadmill. They gave me step-by-step instructions that were spot on. I didn't need to bug any hotel staff for help - I was all set!
I'm just so grateful for these Echo Eyes. They're the real MVPs, you know? This app has seriously made my life so much easier. I can't imagine not having it now. It's a total lifesaver!

developer_response.body: I'm glad Echo Eyes could help you. Whether you can see or not, I just want to say, thank you. By the way, more features are on the way. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: God bless whomever came up with this app and hope AI to be able to continue to help those who cannot help themselves.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your purchase and support. We will keep working hard.

reviews.review_description: I used it for about half an hour, and the space descriptions are very accurate, but there aren’t many features. I hope the development team adds more features soon.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support. I’m delighted to hear that the space descriptions are working accurately for you. We’ll certainly continue adding more features to make the experience even richer. Your feedback is greatly appreciated.

reviews.review_description: The current version has a great experience and responds quickly most of the time. However, sometimes gesture recognition can still make mistakes. Also, blind users need more features, like finding items or voice interaction. This is a meaningful app, and I will support the developers to keep moving forward

developer_response.body: Thank you for your use! I promise to keep updating and bring more features. I hope you continue to use it and give us a five-star rating. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Thanks for making this great app, one little feedback is I hope you can allow three or even four language in app, for since there are lots of multilingual ppl :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for making this great app, one little feedback is I hope you can allow three or even four language in app, for since there are lots of multilingual ppl :)

reviews.review_description: I’m not blind, I still find it really interesting. I hope the developers can add options for non-blind users to interact, like marking obstacles or giving tips for blind users. This could help them even more.

developer_response.body: Thank you sincerely for your thoughtful suggestion. It means a great deal to us. We’re exploring ways for non-blind users to interact more meaningfully — including marking obstacles or offering helpful guidance for blind users. Your idea is inspiring, and we’ll take it into careful consideration as we continue improving the app.

reviews.review_description: But we need more features to meet the needs of blind users.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your purchase and support. We will keep working hard.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded it out of curiosity, and I was surprised at how cool it is. It describes my room in detail, which is really amazing. This can definitely help many blind people.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your recognition. In the future, we will offer more voice options to our users.

reviews.review_description:
I can't say enough good things about how this app provides instant visual assistance - whether you're permanently blind, temporarily dealing with vision issues, or gradually losing your sight. It's been such a game-changer for my daily life.
What surprised me is that it's not just helpful for the visually impaired - people with severe dyslexia and colorblindness can also benefit from it. I had no idea how much colorblindness could impact someone's overall vision until using this app.
The best part? The AI service is super professional and thoughtful. Every time I use it, I get accurate and polite assistance - no worries about privacy or awkward moments. It's incredible how this app makes life so much easier for people who struggle with vision-related challenges.
Major props to the team behind this app. It's more than just a tool - it's like having a reliable partner for those of us who need visual assistance in our daily lives. Really hope this service keeps growing and helping more people who need it! ❤️

developer_response.body: hank you for sharing so much with us. We are truly touched. Our development team will keep working hard to provide more user-friendly and caring services for visually impaired users.

reviews.review_description: This is a very promising app, but I suggest the developers add a voice chat feature soon. It would really help blind people use their hands.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your purchase, support, and suggestions. More features are on the way.

reviews.review_description:
This is a very promising app that can truly help many blind people live more independently.  
However, the current features of the product are still too limited. I believe the developers should quickly provide text recognition, as it is a common need and can really assist many people. I hope the developers continue to update the app and bring more useful features.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support! We'll keep making updates. Trust me, what you want is coming soon. Just give us a little time.
